hero.label: Make a Difference
hero.title: Donate Now
hero.subtitle: Every dollar you give directly funds peacebuilding, education, and community development across Rwanda.

impacts.desc: Provides school supplies for one child for a month.
Plants 25 trees and supports a local reforestation worker.
Covers a community health visit for five families.
Funds one day of a peacebuilding dialogue session.
Sponsors one month of youth leadership training.
Supports a women's cooperative for a full quarter.

trustPoints.title: Secure & Safe
trustPoints.desc: All transactions are encrypted and processed securely.

trustPoints.title: Fully Transparent
trustPoints.desc: Annual reports and financial statements available on request.

trustPoints.title: 100% to Programmes
trustPoints.desc: Administrative costs are covered by dedicated operational grants.
